name: Femmimore Municipal Building
description: Come play pickleball at Femmimore Municipal Building in Fennimore, WI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Platteville Armory
description: $40 per hour.  There are many non-Pickle Ball related line markers on the court since they are multi-purpose courts.  For a beginner, all of the extra lines & colors were confusing, but it got easier after playing a few rounds.
open_play_schedule: You must check the Armory website for openings.

name: Sanders-Trine Pickleball Complex
description: Sanders-Trine Pickleball Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Platteville, WI. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: UW-Platteville Pickleball Court at the Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at UW-Platteville Pickleball Court at the Memorial Park in Platteville, WI! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and water.

name: Westview Park
description: Come play pickleball at Westview Park in Platteville, WI! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
